atomicity.message: Staged payload for land-01 is one atomic bootstrap cleanup: add the .ntm/ runtime-state ignore rule and delete the stale repo-local bin/burpvalve binary from index/worktree.

conditions.message: The applicable lint/style check for this staged chore payload passes. The condition file contains policy guidance and says rules become enforced only when exact commands/analyzers are named; no such project-specific executable lint command is named there for this payload. The staged text diff has no whitespace errors.
evidence: Read backpressure/lint-rules.md; it says setup should create a policy wishlist and a rule is enforced only after the file names the command or analyzer that checks it.
Ran `git diff --cached --check -- .gitignore bin/burpvalve`; command exited 0 with no whitespace/error output.
Ran `git diff --cached --name-status`; staged payload is exactly `M .gitignore` and `D bin/burpvalve`, with no source files staged.

conditions.message: DRY is not applicable to this staged cleanup payload because it adds one ignore rule/comment and deletes one generated binary; it does not add or change logic, helpers, prompts, tests, validation branches, or duplicated implementation paths.
evidence: Read backpressure/dry.md; it targets duplicated logic, copied code blocks, repeated conditionals, repeated constants/prompts, duplicate helpers, and nearly identical tests.
Ran `git diff --cached --stat`; staged payload is `.gitignore` with 2 insertions and deletion of binary `bin/burpvalve`.
Ran `git diff --cached -- .gitignore bin/burpvalve`; the only text change is adding `# NTM runtime state` and `.ntm/`.

conditions.message: The staged payload does the real cleanup it claims instead of leaving a superficial success signal: `.ntm/` is actually added to the staged `.gitignore`, and `bin/burpvalve` is actually removed from the index and absent from the worktree.
evidence: Read backpressure/anti-reward-hacking.md; it requires avoiding superficial success signals, fake completion patterns, and metric gaming.
Ran `git show :'.gitignore'`; the staged index version contains `# NTM runtime state` followed by `.ntm/`.
Ran `git ls-files --stage -- .gitignore bin/burpvalve`; only `.gitignore` appears, confirming `bin/burpvalve` is absent from the staged index.
Ran `[ -e bin/burpvalve ]`; observed `bin/burpvalve absent from worktree`.

conditions.message: This condition is not applicable because the staged payload changes no functions and introduces no behavior that could receive nearby function-level test coverage.
evidence: Read backpressure/one-function-one-test.md; it applies when new or changed behavior requires direct test coverage.
Ran `git diff --cached --name-status`; the only staged files are `.gitignore` and deleted `bin/burpvalve`.
Ran `git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMRTUXB | xargs -r file --brief --mime-type`; the only added/modified staged file is text/plain `.gitignore`.

conditions.message: For this narrow cleanup cell, the checkable definition-of-done items pass: the staged payload is limited to the claimed files, the binary is removed from index/worktree, `.ntm/` is ignored, and read-only verification evidence is recorded here.
evidence: Read backpressure/definition-of-done.md; it asks the project to define checks, review, logs, commits, beads, deployment evidence, and known-risk notes.
Ran `git diff --cached --name-status`; staged payload is exactly `M .gitignore` and `D bin/burpvalve`.

Ran `[ -e bin/burpvalve ]`; observed `bin/burpvalve absent from worktree`.

conditions.message: Evidence is recorded in this response with concrete commands and observations. The condition file does not specify an additional external evidence artifact for this cleanup payload.
evidence: Read backpressure/evidence-log.md; it defines evidence examples such as command output and manual verification notes but does not name a stricter required artifact.

Recorded command evidence from `git diff --cached --name-status`, `git diff --cached --check`, `git show :'.gitignore'`, `git ls-files --stage -- .gitignore bin/burpvalve`, `git check-ignore -v .ntm/example bin/new-burpvalve-test`, and worktree existence checks.
